name: UnDefend - Non-Defender Process Subscribing to WinDefend State
description: Detects a process outside the Defender install path subscribing to WinDefend service status notifications via NotifyServiceStatusChangeW. UnDefend (Nightmare-Eclipse) uses this primitive to race Defender's engine binary replace during a major platform update.
query:
any where process.executable != null and
  (process.name : ("services.exe") or winlog.event_data.CallTrace : "*NotifyServiceStatusChange*") and
  process.parent.executable != null and
  not process.parent.executable : ("C:\\Program Files\\Windows Defender\\*",
    "C:\\ProgramData\\Microsoft\\Windows Defender\\*",
    "C:\\Windows\\System32\\*",
    "C:\\Windows\\SysWOW64\\*")
author: F0RT1KA sectest-builder

name: UnDefend - Non-System Process Opens Defender Definition Updates Directory
description: Detects a non-system process opening C:\ProgramData\Microsoft\Windows Defender\Definition Updates or C:\Windows\System32\MRT for directory enumeration. UnDefend uses FILE_LIST_DIRECTORY + ReadDirectoryChangesW here to race signature-file modifications.
query:
file where event.action in ("creation", "modification", "deletion") and
  (file.path : "*\\Windows Defender\\Definition Updates*" or
   file.path : "*\\System32\\MRT\\*") and
  process.executable != null and
  not process.executable : ("C:\\Program Files\\Windows Defender\\*",
    "C:\\ProgramData\\Microsoft\\Windows Defender\\*",
    "C:\\Windows\\System32\\MpSigStub.exe",
    "C:\\Windows\\System32\\svchost.exe",
    "C:\\Windows\\System32\\MsMpEng.exe") and
  user.name != "SYSTEM"
author: F0RT1KA sectest-builder

name: UnDefend - Defender Update Path Registry Recon
description: Detects a non-Microsoft process reading HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows Defender\ProductAppDataPath or Signature Updates\SignatureLocation. UnDefend reads these values to locate Definition Updates and mpavbase.vdm.
query:
registry where event.action in ("query", "read") and
  (registry.path : "HKLM\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Windows Defender\\ProductAppDataPath" or
   registry.path : "HKLM\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Windows Defender\\Signature Updates\\SignatureLocation") and
  process.executable != null and
  not process.executable : ("C:\\Program Files\\Windows Defender\\*",
    "C:\\ProgramData\\Microsoft\\Windows Defender\\*",
    "C:\\Windows\\System32\\MpSigStub.exe",
    "C:\\Windows\\System32\\svchost.exe")
author: F0RT1KA sectest-builder

name: UnDefend - Defender Signature Update Repeated Failures
description: Defender reports 3+ signature update failures (EventID 2001/2002/2004 in Microsoft-Windows-Windows Defender/Operational) on a host within 6 hours — a strong indicator of UnDefend-class persistent file-lock DoS.
query:
event where event.provider : "Microsoft-Windows-Windows Defender" and
  event.code : ("2001", "2002", "2004")
author: F0RT1KA sectest-builder
